title: GuidanceResultSubmission
description: Optional client report of what it generated from a GuidancePlan. It is content-free: it carries the echoed plan_token, per-seed generation counts, and the deterministic ids of any new examples (ex_{hash}_{index}) so the backend can track and re-score them. It MUST NOT carry prompt text, example inputs/outputs, or any synthesized content. additionalProperties is false.

plan_id.description: The plan_id this submission corresponds to.

plan_token.description: The opaque plan_token from the GuidancePlan, echoed back unchanged for verification.

results.description: Per-seed generation outcomes. Counts and deterministic ids only — never content.

seed_ref.description: The seed_ref from the plan item this result is for.

generated_count.description: How many artifacts the client generated for this seed.

new_example_refs.description: Deterministic ids of newly synthesized examples (ex_{hash}_{index}). No content.
